lessons.title: Skeletal and Muscular Systems
objectives: Identify major bones in the human skeleton
Explain the function of muscles and joints
lessons.experiment: Body Explorer: Click on the skeletal and muscular systems in a 3D model to learn about individual bones, muscles, and how they interact to facilitate movement.

lessons.title: Circulatory and Respiratory Systems
objectives: Trace the path of blood through the heart
Describe the process of gaseous exchange in the lungs
lessons.experiment: Body Explorer: Navigate through the heart and lungs to see blood flow and gas exchange in real-time, clicking on organs for detailed anatomical info.

lessons.title: Cell Structure and Function
objectives: Identify organelles in plant and animal cells
Relate cell structure to function
lessons.experiment: Virtual Microscope: Drag a cell slide under a virtual microscope, adjust the focus, and label the organelles you see.

lessons.title: Cell Division
objectives: Distinguish between mitosis and meiosis
Explain the significance of cell division in growth and reproduction
lessons.experiment: Division Timeline: Drag and drop the stages of mitosis and meiosis into the correct order and watch a short animation of the process.

lessons.title: Nutrients and a Balanced Diet
objectives: Identify main food groups and their functions
Understand the impact of vitamins and minerals
lessons.experiment: Nutrition Calculator: Enter various food items (e.g., '1 Apple', '1 Slice of Pizza') and see a real-time breakdown of calories, proteins, carbs, and fats relative to daily needs.

lessons.title: Digestion and Absorption
objectives: Describe the stages of digestion
Identify the role of enzymes
lessons.experiment: Enzyme Reaction Lab: Change temperature and pH levels to see how they affect the rate of starch breakdown by salivary amylase.

lessons.title: Communicable and Non-communicable Diseases
objectives: Distinguish between types of diseases
Understand common disease vectors
lessons.experiment: Disease Transmission Sim: Watch how a virus spreads through a population in a visual simulation. Adjust variables like 'infection rate' and 'vaccination coverage' to see the outcome.

lessons.title: Immunity and Vaccination
objectives: Explain the body's natural defense mechanisms
Understand how vaccines provide protection
lessons.experiment: Immune Response Game: Deploy white blood cells and antibodies to defend the body against incoming waves of different pathogens.

lessons.title: Water Supply and Pollution
objectives: Understand the water cycle and purification methods
Identify sources of environmental pollution
lessons.experiment: Water Purifier Lab: Arrange layers (sand, gravel, charcoal) to filter a sample of muddy water and test the clarity of the result.

lessons.title: Waste Management
objectives: Describe safe methods of waste disposal
Understand the impact of population growth
lessons.experiment: Waste Sorter Challenge: Categorize various waste items into 'Recycle', 'Compost', or 'Landfill' bins as fast as possible.

lessons.title: Substance Abuse
objectives: Identify types of drugs and their effects on the body
Understand the social consequences of drug abuse
lessons.experiment: Effect Visualizer: Select different substances (e.g., Nicotine, Alcohol) and see a visual representation of their long-term effects on various body organs.

lessons.title: Family Planning and STIs
objectives: Explain various birth control methods
Identify common sexually transmitted infections
lessons.experiment: Contraceptive Match: Match different birth control methods (e.g., barrier, hormonal, surgical) to their descriptions and effectiveness levels.
